description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in shades of gray, blue, and white. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings with twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, and prominent engine nacelles mounted under the wings near the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy, likely designed for a single pilot. The landing gear is extended, showing a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a nose wheel. Distinctive red star insignias are visible on the wings and tail, indicating military affiliation.
description: A modern military jet airplane with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a gray-blue camouflage pattern. Features include an enclosed forward cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and visible military insignia.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the symmetry of the swept-back wings and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, engine nacelles, and extended landing gear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, engine exhausts, and the full span of the wings with insignia.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the camouflage pattern, wing and tail configuration, and landing gear details.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept-back wings with moderate anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers forming an H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy integrated into the fuselage nose.
